app.title: geosurrogate
app.tagline: Active-learning GP surrogates for slope stability reliability
common.no_project: No project selected - open or create one in Home.
model.title: Model
model.demo_info: Demo case: every SRF served comes from a precomputed pool of real RS2 finite-element results. No FEM license needed.
model.rs2_info: Real RS2 mode: run the preflight from a terminal before training:
model.geometry_soon: Geometry viewer arrives with the RS2 geometry extraction (backlog).
vars.title: Variables
vars.note: Dimensionality emerges from variable selection: any subset of material properties defines the input space.
vars.table_caption: Stochastic variables (read-only in this version; edit project.yaml to change)
dist.title: Distributions
dist.note: RS2-style definition: parametric family + absolute truncation. The shaded band is the surrogate training box.
doe.title: Design of Experiments
train.title: Training
train.pause_req: Pause requested - the loop stops after the current iteration.
train.launched: Training launched in the background (PID {pid}). The chart refreshes automatically.
train.convergence: Convergence - max |surface change| per AL iteration
train.stale: State not updated for a while - the background process may have been stopped.
val.title: Validation
val.cost_note: LOOCV refits the GP once per training point; the K-S curve refits for every n. Both take minutes with full MCMC.
val.need_test: Needs an independent labeled set: demo projects use the unused pool automatically; real projects need a FEM results file (var ids + srf).
val.launched: Analysis launched in the background - refresh this page when it finishes (see log below).
val.no_reject_h0: H0 not rejected at significance level 0.05
exp.title: Exploitation
exp.launched: MCS launched in the background - refresh when finished.
report.title: Report & downloads
report.html_soon: One-click PDF/HTML report is on the backlog; all figures and metrics are downloadable below.
val.testset: Independent FEM testset (for massive validation and K-S)
val.testset_note: Generates an LHS batch inside the training box and simulates it with the real solver. Hours of FEM time; resumable. Do not run while training is active (shared RS2 ports).
val.sec_internal_note: LOOCV retrains the model leaving one point out at a time. No independent dataset is required.
val.sec_independent: Independent validation - requires a FEM dataset the model never saw
val.sec_independent_note: Massive validation and the K-S convergence curve compare the surrogate against independent FEM results. Choose or create the validation dataset first.
val.dataset_pool: Demo pool ({n} unused real FEM results)
val.dataset_none: No independent dataset yet: generate one with the FEM solver or upload a labeled file (variable ids + srf).
next.title: Next step
next.done: Flow complete - review and download results
home.fez_intro: From-zero workflow: upload your RS2 model, detect its materials, select the stochastic variables and create the project. Requires RS2 installed and licensed on this machine.
home.fez_detecting: Starting RS2 Modeler and reading the model...
home.fez_editor_note: Tick the material properties to treat as random variables. Defaults: mean = current model value, std = 10%, box = mean +/- 3 std (the box is both the truncation and the surrogate training domain).
home.fez_created: Project created. Next: run the preflight on the Model page.
model.preflight_note: Connects to RS2, checks that the configured variables match the model materials and (optionally) runs one timed smoke simulation. Run it before training.
model.preflight_smoke: Include one smoke simulation (measures FEM time)
